title: Alignment
text: Alignment Specify how the data is aligned in the field. Value Description (default) Use system defaults. Left Data is left-aligned. This is the default for all fields except boilerplate fields. Right Uniface aligns the data from the right. Centered Data is centered in the field. This is the default for boilerplate fields. When used in an edit box, if the text is longer than the field width, the text is not scrolled to show the text in the center of the field. Decimal Data is aligned to the decimal point or comma, as defined in the display format. Description Note: Due to limitations in the underlying Windows controls, it is not possible to right align or center edit box or multiline edit box fields that are too small to display the data and that have the Automatic Word Wrap or Transparency properties selected. Applies to Modeled Field Layout Related Links Automatic Word Wrap Determines whether text is automatically wrapped to the next line when it exceeds the width of the widget. This also disables the horizontal scroll bar, if defined. True or False (default). Transparency Determines whether the widget is transparent. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
